channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

item.title: Novara Media: Union Members Are Abandoning Labour and Flocking to Reform
item.description: Union Members Are Abandoning Labour and Flocking to Reform

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Police officer received death threats over Nowak murder case as Mahmood condemns ‘dangerous’ commentary – UK politics live

item.title: Byline Times: Peter Mandelson, The New Statesman and How the 'Soft PR' Sausage Gets Made

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer uses disappearing messages on WhatsApp, No 10 admits after Mandelson files released

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson should never have been ambassador, Yvette Cooper says after damning messages revealed

item.title: The Guardian: Labour ‘not looking to raise taxes to fund benefits’ as Mandelson messages suggest - The Guardian
